vivid/text/body/font-family.$description: The font family used for all body text.

vivid/text/body/font-stretch.$description: The font stretch applied to all body text.

vivid/text/body/sm/font-weight/normal.$description: The default font weight for small body text.

vivid/text/body/sm/font-weight/bold.$description: The bold font weight for small body text.

vivid/text/body/sm/font-size.$description: Font size for small body text.

vivid/text/body/sm/line-height.$description: Line height for small body text.

vivid/text/body/md/font-weight/normal.$description: The default font weight for medium body text.

vivid/text/body/md/font-weight/bold.$description: The bold font weight for medium body text.

vivid/text/body/md/font-size.$description: Font size for medium body text.

vivid/text/body/md/line-height.$description: Line height for medium body text.

vivid/text/body/lg/font-weight/normal.$description: The default font weight for large body text.

vivid/text/body/lg/font-weight/bold.$description: The bold font weight for large body text.

vivid/text/body/lg/font-size.$description: Font size for large body text.

vivid/text/body/lg/line-height.$description: Line height for large body text.

vivid/text/body/sm.$description: A small body size for captions, helper text, and secondary UI text.

vivid/text/body/md.$description: The default body size for paragraphs and general UI text.

vivid/text/body/lg.$description: A large body size for high-emphasis content such as lead or important paragraphs and highlighted UI text.
